chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2482 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement, as flagged. 08.02.2018. None present. As per statement filed by the petitioner dated 01.02.2018 available on record, learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition, which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
